title: glandularia aurantiaca
intro: Glandularia aurantiaca, also known as the orange button mint or rock mint, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Glandularia aurantiaca include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as reduction of inflammation and pain. Glandularia aurantiaca can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
